scenes.title: LiveAvatarStream3D
scenes.subtitle: A 3D talking-avatar studio — 100% in your browser

scenes.text: 100% in your browser — no installs, no render farm
This is LiveAvatarStream3D: a three-D talking-avatar news studio that runs entirely in your browser. No installs, and no render farm.
The avatar you see renders live in three-D, with blendshape lip-sync, gestures, and camera moves, all in real time. The preview is exactly what you export.
You author the performance as plain text, tagging each line with emotion, gesture, and camera direction. Direction is just data, not code.
When you are happy, export a full ten-eighty-p or four-K MP4, rendered frame by frame in the browser with WebCodecs. There is no GPU server in the loop.
